source_jobs.title: Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
OVERVIEW

Physical AI, a real model of the world, is the next trillion dollar opportunity and a foundational pillar for energy, robotics and superintelligence.

At Jua we are building it now. Our models already run on four continents and help power the energy buildout needed to support ever larger intelligence.

We are assembling a world-class team of researchers and entrepreneurial minds to turn this model into reality at global scale. If you want the opportunity of your life, come build physical AI with us.




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR



We’re looking for an ambitious Account Executive to accelerate growth across our B2B platform product. You’ll own the full sales cycle, from outbound prospecting to onboarding, focused on high-velocity, smaller-ticket deals in the energy trading space for both technical and non-technical decision makers.

This is a high-impact, high-ownership role at the foundation of our commercial organization. You’ll work closely with the CEO and Head of Sales to shape our go-to-market strategy, refine the sales playbook, and drive the initiatives that power our next stage of growth.

You’ll thrive in this role if you’re energised by fast-paced, high-pressure environments, have a hunter mentality, and are comfortable navigating ambiguity to get results.





RESPONSIBILITIES AND TASKS



 - Own the full sales cycle from prospecting and outreach to negotiation and closing, using solution- and value-based selling techniques

 - Conduct discovery calls, deliver tailored presentations and demos

 - Drive new business across our self-serve and platform offerings, with a focus on high-velocity deals

 - Build and manage a qualified pipeline with targeted outbound strategies for key verticals

 - Understand customer pain points and communicate our value proposition with clarity and impact

 - Maintain accurate, up-to-date CRM records (Hubspot), including opportunity details, timelines, and next steps, to support forecasting and performance tracking

 - Act as the main point of contact post-sale, ensuring smooth onboarding, strong early adoption, and long-term account health

 - Identify upsell opportunities and proactively address churn risks through ongoing customer engagement

 - Collaborate with cross-functional teams (Engineering, Product) to navigate deals efficiently and share insights that shape product development

 - Support renewal and expansion conversations to drive customer growth

 - Travel as needed to attend industry events and meet customers
   
   


NEED-TO-HAVE



 - 3-5 years of B2B sales experience in a high-growth, early-stage startup environment

 - Previous success in selling new product categories as opposed to being a "price configurator.”

 - Possess a high technical aptitude and a hunter mentality

 - Background in trading (energy, commodities, or financial markets)

 - Proven track record of high performance and exceeding targets

 - Strong domain knowledge of the weather or energy industry

 - Ability to “speak the language” of traders, meteorologists, and technical decision-makers, and serve as a trusted advisor
   
   


NICE-TO-HAVE



 - Advanced degree (PhD or MSc) in a quantitative discipline

 - Has built automated outbound channels with tools such as CRM, Clay, etc.
   
   


PERSONAL ATTRIBUTES



 - You are all in, are able to travel frequently, willing to work long hours and do whatever it takes to win

 - You are highly intelligent and combine this with a strong execution bias

 - You move fast, make smart decisions under pressure, and thrive in ambiguity

 - You take initiative and don’t wait on instructions

 - You’re a highly creative problem solver that can hack solutions



Please note: We prioritise your answers to the application questions over your CV, so we encourage you to complete them as thoughtfully and thoroughly as possible.

At Jua, we foster a performance culture and value people who embody our beliefs of service and adventure. We prioritize agility, ope

source_jobs.title: Chief of Staff
source_jobs.description:
OVERVIEW

Physical AI, a real model of the world, is the next trillion dollar opportunity and a foundational pillar for energy, robotics and superintelligence.

At Jua we are building it now. Our models already run on four continents and help power the energy buildout needed to support ever larger intelligence.

We are assembling a world-class team of researchers and entrepreneurial minds to turn this model into reality at global scale. If you want the opportunity of your life, come build physical AI with us.




THE ROLE



You work directly with the founder. You operate as a force multiplier who plugs into whatever matters that day and makes sure it gets done. That includes deals, product calls, investor work, model launches, internal alignment, and fixing operational gaps before they slow us down. The pace is high. The context load is real. You will see everything.




WHAT YOU WILL DO



 - Work with me on the highest leverage problems across product, GTM, partnerships, operations, and fundraising

 - Sit in high-stakes meetings with customers, investors, and strategic partners

 - Bring clarity to priorities and make sure decisions turn into action

 - Build lightweight dashboards and operating systems that keep the team aligned

 - Own cross-functional projects end-to-end and clear bottlenecks quickly

 - Write sharp briefs, investor materials, and internal notes

 - Handle practical execution when needed, such as travel, schedules, logistics, and on-site coordination
   
   


WHO YOU ARE



 - Extremely fast learner who can switch contexts without dropping quality

 - Strong analytical ability and comfortable with Python and data tools (vibe coding is enough)

 - Clear and concise communicator who can compress complexity

 - High ownership, bias toward action, zero drama

 - Ambitious and want to operate close to the core of the company

 - Backgrounds that tend to work well include top consulting, investment banking, founder’s office roles, early stage operators, ex-founders, ML engineers with broader interests, or exceptional outliers
   
   


REQUIREMENTS



 - Relocation to Zurich

 - Frequent short notice travel to the UK, Nordics, US, and Asia

 - Ability to operate at high speed and handle fast decision cycles

 - Whatever it takes mindset





Please note: We prioritise your answers to the application questions over your CV, so we encourage you to complete them as thoughtfully and thoroughly as possible.

At Jua, we foster a performance culture and value people who embody our beliefs of service and adventure. We prioritize agility, operating at the highest clock speed to adapt quickly to change.

We innovate on behalf of our users and leverage data supremacy to maintain our competitive edge. Through clear communication and fact-based decision-making, we ensure alignment in our pursuit of excellence.

With these principles, we aim to create a customer-focused, value-centric organization that sets new standards in the industry. We value the unique perspectives that each individual brings to the table and believe that embracing diverse backgrounds and experiences enriches our collective journey towards growth and success.

source_jobs.title: Executive Assistant & Office Operations
source_jobs.description:
OVERVIEW

Physical AI, a real model of the world, is the next trillion dollar opportunity and a foundational pillar for energy, robotics and superintelligence.

At Jua we are building it now. Our models already run on four continents and help power the energy buildout needed to support ever larger intelligence.

We are assembling a world-class team of researchers and entrepreneurial minds to turn this model into reality at global scale. If you want the opportunity of your life, come build physical AI with us.




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR



We’re looking for an Executive Assistant & Office Operations professional to remove friction from the day-to-day of the leadership team and protect their time. You’ll own complex calendar management, international travel, office operations, administrative support, and logistics in a fast-moving environment.

This role requires strong judgment, exceptional prioritisation skills, and the ability to operate independently. You should also be comfortable with automations, AI agents or lightweight systems to improve efficiency.

This role is ideal for someone who thrives in high-pressure environments and enjoys taking ownership. You’ll thrive in this role if you are energised by helping ambitious people operate at their best.




RESPONSIBILITIES AND TASKS



 - Own complex calendar management and protect executive time by balancing shifting priorities, travel schedules and competing demands

 - Coordinate internal and external meetings across multiple time zones, serving as a professional and reliable coordinator for customers, investors, board members, and senior stakeholders

 - Coordinate domestic and international travel, including flights, accommodation, visas, transport, itineraries, parking, and contingency planning

 - Support board and investor relations logistics, including scheduling, meeting coordination, and administrative support

 - Manage office operations, including office supplies, facilities, maintenance, vendor coordination, lunches, and day-to-day office logistics

 - Support onboarding and offboarding logistics, including equipment handover and asset tracking

 - Plan and coordinate off-sites, conferences, team events, and other ad hoc company initiatives and logistics

 - Anticipate problems before they arise and proactively solve operational and logistical challenges to keep things running smoothly

 - Provide ad hoc operational and administrative support as needed
   
   


NEED-TO-HAVE



 - 4-7 years of experience as an Executive Assistant or Office Manager in a fast-moving start-up environment

 - Experience supporting C-level executives and founders with scheduling and competing demands

 - Exceptional organisational skills and obsessive attention to detail

 - Strong written and verbal communication skills in English. German proficiency is a plus

 - Experience coordinating complex international travel, logistics, visas, and itineraries

 - Experience coordinating senior stakeholder meetings across time zones, including leadership, board, customer, or investor meetings

 - Strong judgment, discretion, and ability to handle highly confidential information

 - Ability to manage multiple priorities simultaneously while staying calm

 - Comfort operating in ambiguity and making sound decisions independently

 - Strong prioritisation skills and the confidence to protect executive time and focus

 - Comfort experimenting with tools, automations, agents, integrations, or lightweight systems to reduce friction and improve efficiency

 - Strong execution bias and willingness to go beyond the job description to get things done

 - Familiarity with tools such as Google Workspace, Slack, Notion, and similar productivity systems
   
   

At Jua, we foster a performance culture and value people who embody our beliefs of service and adventure. We prioritize agility, operating at the highest clock speed to adapt quickly to change.

We innovate on behalf of our users and leverage data

source_jobs.title: Customer Success Manager
source_jobs.description:
OVERVIEW

Physical AI, a real model of the world, is the next trillion dollar opportunity and a foundational pillar for energy, robotics and superintelligence.

At Jua we are building it now. Our models already run on four continents and help power the energy buildout needed to support ever larger intelligence.

We are assembling a world-class team of researchers and entrepreneurial minds to turn this model into reality at global scale. If you want the opportunity of your life, come build physical AI with us.




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR



We’re looking for a Customer Success Manager to work directly with leading energy traders and utilities, helping them get the most out of Jua’s AI-powered weather intelligence platform.

This role sits at the intersection of customer success and sales engineering. You’ll combine technical expertise with commercial ownership, supporting customers through onboarding and integration while driving renewals, upsells, and long-term account growth. You’ll work closely with customers to turn data into decisions and ensure Jua’s technology directly improves their trading performance. You’ll own the full post-sale relationship and play an active role in pre-sales discussions when needed.




RESPONSIBILITIES AND TASKS



 - Build strong, trust-based relationships with key customers and act as their main point of contact post-sale.

 - Lead onboarding and technical integrations, helping customers connect to Jua’s APIs, data pipelines, and analytics tools.

 - Define goals, success metrics, and ROI in collaboration with customers to ensure measurable impact on their trading outcomes

 - Analyze and communicate weather and market data insights that influence trading strategies and decision-making

 - Manage renewals, upsells, and cross-sells in close partnership with the sales team, identifying opportunities for account expansion

 - Track account health, usage, and satisfaction, and take proactive steps to resolve any issues

 - Collaborate with product and engineering teams to surface insights, feedback, and feature requests from customers, ensuring alignment across all stakeholders.

 - Represent Jua at customer meetings, workshops, and industry events, acting as the key link between internal and external stakeholders.
   
   


NEED-TO-HAVE



 - 3–5 years of experience in key account management, customer success, or technical solutions roles, within a startup environment

 - Strong proficiency in Python for data analysis, visualization, APIs, and workflow troubleshooting

 - Familiarity with energy trading markets and how weather data influences trading decisions

 - Ability to interpret and explain weather data and forecasts to both technical and commercial stakeholders

 - Proven success managing renewals, upsells, or account expansion in a technical or data-driven context

 - Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills, with the proven ability to collaborate effectively across sales, product, and engineering

 - A high degree of ownership, adaptability, and curiosity, with the drive to move fast and deliver meaningful results





Please note: We prioritise your answers to the application questions over your CV, so we encourage you to complete them as thoughtfully and thoroughly as possible.



At Jua, we foster a performance culture and value people who embody our beliefs of service and adventure. We prioritize agility, operating at the highest clock speed to adapt quickly to change.

We innovate on behalf of our users and leverage data supremacy to maintain our competitive edge. Through clear communication and fact-based decision-making, we ensure alignment in our pursuit of excellence.

With these principles, we aim to create a customer-focused, value-centric organization that sets new standards in the industry. We value the unique perspectives that each individual brings to the table and believe that embracing diverse backgrounds and experiences enriches our collective journey to

source_jobs.title: Member of Technical Staff (Backend & Infrastructure)
source_jobs.description:
OVERVIEW

Physical AI, a real model of the world, is the next trillion dollar opportunity and a foundational pillar for energy, robotics and superintelligence.

At Jua we are building it now. Our models already run on four continents and help power the energy buildout needed to support ever larger intelligence.

We are assembling a world-class team of researchers and entrepreneurial minds to turn this model into reality at global scale. If you want the opportunity of your life, come build physical AI with us.






WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR



We’re redefining earth simulation with machine learning, building a system that outperforms traditional models in speed, precision, and accuracy. Our team moves fast, leveraging a versatile tech stack and state-of-the-art cloud infrastructure to maximize performance and efficiency.

We believe in using the right tools for the job. We are combining robust web technologies, advanced ML frameworks, and powerful numerical computing. With a focus on type-safe programming and infrastructure-as-code, we ensure scalability without excess complexity.

As a Software Engineer, you’ll help shape our backend systems, pipelines, and cloud infrastructure. You’ll thrive in ambiguity, iterate fast, and turn ideas into working prototypes. If you have a hacker’s mindset, love building from scratch, and excel in lean, high-impact environments, we’d love to hear from you.




OUR TECH STACK



 - Core Languages: Python is our go-to for backend development, data pipelines, and ML integration. Deep experience with modern Python is a must.

 - Databases & Storage: We operate a large ClickHouse cluster for analytics workloads and PostgreSQL for transactional data. Experience with distributed databases and data modeling is highly valued.

 - Data Pipelines & Orchestration: We build reliable, scalable data pipelines using Dagster for orchestration and comprehensive observability.

 - Cloud & Infrastructure: We use a mix of cloud (AWS) and bare metal infrastructure, with tools like Terraform for infrastructure-as-code.

 - Other Tools: While Python is our primary language, we believe in using the right tool for the job. You’ll have the freedom to introduce new technologies when they make sense.
   
   


RESPONSIBILITIES AND TASKS



 - Build scalable systems: Design, develop, and deploy backend pipelines, services, and cloud infrastructure with a focus on speed, scalability, and pragmatism. You’ll work across the stack—from database systems to occasional front-end integrations and CI/CD pipelines—in a mixed multi-cloud and bare metal environment.

 - Help to shape our architecture and roadmap: Play a key role in defining how we build and scale. As an early senior engineer, you’ll influence technical strategy, refine system architecture, and ensure long-term maintainability while moving fast.

 - Bring ML models to production: Work closely with ML engineers to deploy models that power real-world decision-making, ensuring performance, reliability, and usability for customers, including power traders.

 - Identify and tackle technical challenges: Address performance bottlenecks, refactor critical systems, and strike the right balance between rapid iteration and long-term stability.

 - Prototype and iterate quickly: Move fast, test ideas, and refine approaches with short feedback cycles to drive continuous improvement.
   
   


NEED-TO-HAVE



 - Bachelor’s degree (or higher) in Computer Science or a related field.

 - 3+ years of experience in a Software Engineering role.

 - Strong experience in deploying and supporting large-scale production systems.

 - Ability to make pragmatic, fast-paced architectural decisions while managing technical debt effectively.

 - Proactive in identifying problems, performance bottlenecks, and areas for improvement.

 - Nice-to-have: Exposure to Data Engineering or related experience.
   
   


AT THE END OF YOUR FIRST 30 DAYS, YOU WILL HAVE



 - Gained deep product immersion: Underst

source_jobs.title: Member of the technical staff (Frontend Engineer)
source_jobs.description:
OVERVIEW

Physical AI, a real model of the world, is the next trillion dollar opportunity and a foundational pillar for energy, robotics and superintelligence.

At Jua we are building it now. Our models already run on four continents and help power the energy buildout needed to support ever larger intelligence.

We are assembling a world-class team of researchers and entrepreneurial minds to turn this model into reality at global scale. If you want the opportunity of your life, come build physical AI with us.




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR



We’re hiring a front-end–leaning full-stack engineer to help define and build the future of our platform.

You should have a strong sense of design, deep empathy for users, and a general grasp of machine learning or the latest AI technologies. You don’t need to be a researcher or a math prodigy for this role, but we are specifically looking for candidates who approach problems from first principles and thrive in a culture that grants significant individual responsibility. We value people who are deeply curious about how systems fundamentally work—whether it's computers, satellites, AI, societies, or human psychology—and who are eager to collaborate with other exceptional individuals to broaden their perspective even further.

You’ll thrive here if you’re driven to push the boundaries of the current state-of-the-art and expand human knowledge in forecasting and simulating the future. If you believe that hard work leads to outsized returns, enjoy taking ownership and building exceptional products, and have a talent for transforming complex systems into clear, fast, and elegant experiences, this is the place for you.

Jua is currently evolving its core platform into two focused products:

 - A developer-focused API platform designed for integrators and quants to access our prediction models & data products for their daily trading operations. These users care about simple, smart and clean interfaces, low-latency data, and seamless integration via our SDK.

 - An AI-native product built for decision-makers like traders and meteorologists who want answers, not just data. Think of a geospatial reasoning layer for planet earth. This product uses agents based on language models to interact with our simulation models to deliver insights and decision support.

You’ll simplify complexity for non-technical users while enabling technical users to work with precision and control.

Location: Although we are a global team, it is a requirement that applicants are currently based in Zurich, Switzerland, working on a Hybrid working model.






OUR TECH STACK



 - Frontend: TypeScript, React & Tailwind

 - Design: Ultra minimalistic, lightweight design system. For some time now, we've entirely skipped the classic Wireframe–Figma–Component workflow and just vibe code most frontend components directly.

 - Visualization: ECharts, Three.js, Mapbox, Plotly, Deck.gl http://Deck.gl for map-heavy and time-series UI

 - Backend: Python, FastAPI, WebSockets, gRPC endpoints, little bit of rust, Zarr & Clickhouse SQL db

 - ML Interfaces: Real-time inference, model metadata, probabilistic forecasts, & geospatial datasets
   
   


RESPONSIBILITIES AND TASKS



 - Own and shape full features and products end-to-end to support multiple products, user personas, and evolving data needs by building reusable UI components

 - Build intuitive, high-performance UIs for both technical users and decision-makers with a focus on clarity and responsiveness

 - Develop rich interfaces for time-series, geospatial, and probabilistic data, turning raw model outputs into decision-support tools

 - Collaborate with researchers and engineers to make complex model outputs usable and understandable
   
   


NEED-TO-HAVE



 - 4+ years of front-end engineering with React and TypeScript

 - Strong aesthetic sensibility and user-centered design mindset

 - Proven ability to ship fast, accessible, maintainable UIs at a high-quality bar

 - A desi

source_jobs.title: Data Engineering Intern
source_jobs.description:
OVERVIEW

Physical AI, a real model of the world, is the next trillion dollar opportunity and a foundational pillar for energy, robotics and superintelligence.

At Jua we are building it now. Our models already run on four continents and help power the energy buildout needed to support ever larger intelligence.

We are assembling a world-class team of researchers and entrepreneurial minds to turn this model into reality at global scale. If you want the opportunity of your life, come build physical AI with us.




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR



We’re looking for an exceptional and ambitious Data Engineering Intern who’s eager to learn fast, take ownership, and contribute to real production systems.

You’ll work together with our experienced data and AI engineers and support expanding and refining Jua’s data infrastructure, focusing on data acquisition, validation, and integration using Dagster, Python, and modern cloud technologies. Your work will directly accelerate our ability to onboard new datasets and improve model performance.

Internship duration: 3 months (extendable to 6 months)




RESPONSIBILITIES AND TASKS



 - Integrate and onboard new weather, climate, and geospatial datasets into Jua’s data infrastructure

 - Build and maintain robust data pipelines using Dagster, ensuring reliability and scalability

 - Collaborate with engineers and scientists to validate data quality, completeness, and usability

 - Contribute to documentation and automation that improve data ingestion and processing workflows

 - Support hindcast generation and other foundational data operations to increase engineering throughput

 - Learn directly from experienced mentors while contributing to production-grade systems that power Jua’s AI models
   
   


NEED-TO-HAVE



 - Currently pursuing or recently completed a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computational Science, Engineering, Physics, Atmospheric or Earth Science
   
   - or a proof that you are exceptional in your field without a degree (show us your projects on Github)

 - Strong programming skills in Python and familiarity with Git

 - High intellect, curiosity, strong attention to detail, and a drive to excel in a fast-paced environment where intensity, long hours, and high standards are the norm
   
   


NICE-TO-HAVE



 - Understanding of data pipelines, ETL processes, and workflow orchestration tools such as Dagster, Airflow, or Prefect

 - Basic familiarity with GCP or AWS, and experience handling structured or geospatial data

 - Familiarity with Docker or containerized development

 - Knowledge of SQL and basic data modeling concepts

 - Interest in machine learning or large-scale simulation systems
   
   


AT THE END OF YOUR INTERNSHIP, YOU WILL HAVE



 - Built and deployed data pipelines used in production at Jua

 - Onboarded new datasets that enhance model accuracy and experimentation speed

 - Gained hands-on experience with Dagster, cloud infrastructure, and collaborative data workflows

 - Contributed directly to Jua’s mission to redefine how the world forecasts and understands the physical world

 - Demonstrated exceptional ownership, technical skill, and impact
   
   


ABOUT YOU



 - You’re technically strong, curious, and eager to learn fast

 - You take initiative and enjoy solving open-ended problems

 - You thrive in an environment where expectations are high and feedback is direct

 - You’re excited by the idea of working with world-class engineers and scientists on real-world data challenges





Please note: We prioritise your answers to the application questions over your CV, so we encourage you to complete them as thoughtfully and thoroughly as possible.

At Jua, we foster a performance culture and value people who embody our beliefs of service and adventure. We prioritize agility, operating at the highest clock speed to adapt quickly to change.

We innovate on behalf of our users and leverage data supremacy to maintain our competitive edge. Through clea

source_jobs.description:
OVERVIEW

Physical AI, a real model of the world, is the next trillion dollar opportunity and a foundational pillar for energy, robotics and superintelligence.

At Jua we are building it now. Our models already run on four continents and help power the energy buildout needed to support ever larger intelligence.

We are assembling a world-class team of researchers and entrepreneurial minds to turn this model into reality at global scale. If you want the opportunity of your life, come build physical AI with us.




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR



We’re redefining earth simulation with machine learning, building a system that outperforms traditional models in speed, precision, and accuracy. Our team moves fast, leveraging a versatile tech stack and state-of-the-art cloud infrastructure to maximize performance and efficiency.

We believe in using the right tools for the job, combining robust web technologies, advanced ML frameworks, and powerful numerical computing. With a focus on type-safe programming and infrastructure-as-code, we ensure scalability without excess complexity.

As a Software Engineer, you’ll help shape our backend systems, pipelines, and cloud infrastructure. You’ll thrive in ambiguity, iterate fast, and turn ideas into working prototypes. If you have a hacker’s mindset, love building from scratch, and excel in lean, high-impact environments, we’d love to hear from you.



Location: Although we are a global team, it is a requirement that applicants are currently based in Zurich, Switzerland, working on a Hybrid working model.





OUR TECH STACK



 - Core Languages: Python is our go-to for backend development, data pipelines, and ML integration. Deep experience with modern Python is a must. We also have a light dusting of rust where performance is critical.

 - Data & Geospatial Libraries: We rely heavily on libraries like Xarray, Pandas, and Polars for numerical computing and geospatial data processing. Familiarity with these tools is a big plus.

 - Cloud & Infrastructure: We use a mix of multi-cloud (GCP, AWS, Cloudflare) and bare metal infrastructure, with tools like Pulumi for infrastructure-as-code.

 - ML Frameworks: We leverage popular ML libraries and frameworks to build and deploy models efficiently

 - Other Tools: While Python is our primary language, we believe in using the right tool for the job. You’ll have the freedom to introduce new technologies when they make sense.
   
   


RESPONSIBILITIES AND TASKS



 - Build scalable systems: Design, develop, and deploy backend pipelines, services, and cloud infrastructure with a focus on speed, scalability, and pragmatism. You’ll work across the stack—from backend services to occasional front-end integrations and CI/CD pipelines—in a mixed multi-cloud and bare metal environment.

 - Help to shape our architecture and roadmap: Play a key role in defining how we build and scale. As an early senior engineer, you’ll influence technical strategy, optimize system design, and ensure long-term maintainability while moving fast.

 - Bring ML models to production: Work closely with ML engineers to deploy models that power real-world decision-making, ensuring performance, reliability, and usability for customers, including power traders.

 - Identify and tackle technical challenges: Address performance bottlenecks, refactor critical systems, and strike the right balance between rapid iteration and long-term stability.

 - Prototype and iterate quickly: Move fast, test ideas, and refine approaches with short feedback cycles to drive continuous improvement.
   
   


NEED-TO-HAVE



 - Bachelor’s degree (or higher) in Computer Science or a related field.

 - 5+ years of experience in a Software Engineering role.

 - Strong experience with modern Python in large-scale production systems.

 - Ability to make pragmatic, fast-paced decisions while managing technical debt effectively.

 - Proactive in identifying problems, performance bottlenecks, and areas for improvement.

source_jobs.description:
